reasoning: According to the baseline value of 1.000 for the formula '1 + (30-day average of battles over the last 360 days)', there were exactly 0 recorded 'Battles' in Bangladesh across the entire 360-day baseline period. For the claim to resolve to YES, there would need to be 11 or more battles in a single 30-day window (more than 10x the reference value). A jump from 0 battles a year to 11+ battles in a single month would require a sudden, massive new insurgency encompassing frequent violent clashes. There is no evidence of such an outbreak occurring in late 2025 or early 2026. Therefore, the chance of this occurring by either January 11 or February 3 is extremely low. I am assigning 2% for the earlier date and 3% for the later date to reflect marginally more uncertainty further out.
